title: [BUG] DataValidation formula returning NaN
author: mstfkhazaal
body:
My Code
```
  data.dataValidations.add('A2:A9999', {
        type: 'date',
        operator: 'lessThan',
        showErrorMessage: true,
        allowBlank: true,
        formulae: ["'NOW()'"]
      })
```
It is returning NaN

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @mstfkhazaal Can you describe in detail where NaN is?

comments.author: mstfkhazaal
comments.body:
> @mstfkhazaal Can you describe in detail where NaN is?

In excel 
Data->Data Validation-> End date

comments.author: wadiasalem
comments.body: Any updates ? i have the same problem!
